evaluation_method: SciQ is a dataset of 13,679 crowdsourced multiple-choice science exam questions (Physics, Chemistry, Biology) with 4 answer options each. For the majority of questions, a supporting evidence paragraph is provided. The original paper evaluates models by accuracy on the multiple-choice questions. In lm-eval-harness, the model is presented with each question and its 4 answer choices. The log-likelihood of each answer choice conditioned on the question (and optionally the support paragraph) is computed, and the choice with highest log-likelihood is selected. Accuracy is the proportion of correctly selected answers.
